name: CRG Transport

name: Crystal River Coaches
districts_or_customers: likely Milwaukee Public Schools HSV/specialty contractor
recent_news: No web presence or recent news found; not to be confused with Crystal Limousine & Coach (5859 S 13th St, Milwaukee, Samer Abulughod) which is a separate limo operator. Crystal River Coaches appears to be a micro-operator at 11016 W Lincoln Ave.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (2 employees, ~$138K revenue) family-owned specialty van operation. Too small for a tuck-in on its own; only relevant if rolling up many Milwaukee HSV vendors to win MPS RFP 1147 small-vehicle awards.

name: Quick Service Transportation
districts_or_customers: likely Milwaukee Public Schools HSV/specialty programs contractor
recent_news: D&B lists Quick Service Transportation I at 2407 N 35th St, Milwaukee, WI 53210 (vs. 2405 in source data), founded 2004, incorporated, 2 employees, ~$100K revenue, transportation services NEC. Owner not listed on D&B profile but source data names Barbara Butler as President.
fit_notes: 22-year-old micro-operator (founded 2004) — owner likely approaching retirement, but scale (~$100K revenue, 2 employees) is far below Summit's tuck-in threshold. Relevant only in a Milwaukee specialty/small-vehicle vendor consolidation play tied to MPS RFP 1147.
